dashboard.label: Armis Collectors Product Listing and Aging View

search.query: | inputlookup armis_collectors_fixed.csv | eval creation_epoch=strptime('Creation Date (GMT -4)',"%Y-%m-%d %H:%M:%S") | eval age_days=round((now()-creation_epoch)/86400,0) | eval proxy_clean=trim('Https Proxy') | eval dns_clean=trim('DNS Servers') | eval ntp_clean=trim('NTP Servers')
| stats count
| sort creation_epoch | head 1 | table Name "Collector ID" "Creation Date (GMT -4)"
| sort -creation_epoch | head 1 | table Name "Collector ID" "Creation Date (GMT -4)"
| stats count by Status | sort -count

panel.title: 🧮 Total Number of Armis Collectors with a Single DNS Entry

search.query: | eval dns_count=mvcount(split(dns_clean,",")) | where dns_clean!="" | where dns_count=1 | stats count
| where like('IP Address',"169.254.%") | stats count
| where isnull('Default Gateway') OR trim('Default Gateway')="" | stats count
| eval dns_count=mvcount(split(dns_clean,",")) | eval flag=if(dns_clean!="" AND dns_count=1,1,0) | stats sum(flag) as affected count as total | eval pct=round((affected/total)*100,2)."%" | table pct

panel.title: ⏱️ Total Number of Armis Collectors with a Single NTP Setting = time.cloudflare.com

search.query: | eval ntp_count=mvcount(split(ntp_clean,",")) | where ntp_count=1 AND ntp_clean="time.cloudflare.com" | stats count

| eval ntp_count=mvcount(split(ntp_clean,",")) | eval flag=if(ntp_count=1 AND ntp_clean="time.cloudflare.com",1,0) | stats sum(flag) as affected count as total | eval pct=round((affected/total)*100,2)."%" | table pct

panel.title: 🌐 Total Number of Armis Collectors with a Single DNS setting = 8.8.8.8

search.query: | eval dns_count=mvcount(split(dns_clean,",")) | where dns_count=1 AND dns_clean="8.8.8.8" | stats count

| eval dns_count=mvcount(split(dns_clean,",")) | eval flag=if(dns_count=1 AND dns_clean="8.8.8.8",1,0) | stats sum(flag) as affected count as total | eval pct=round((affected/total)*100,2)."%" | table pct

panel.title: 🛰️ Total Number of Armis Collectors using Proxy = http://vzproxy.verizon.com:9290

search.query: | where proxy_clean="http://vzproxy.verizon.com:9290" | stats count

panel.title: 📈 Percentage of Armis Collectors set Proxy vzproxy (%)

search.query: | eval flag=if(proxy_clean="http://vzproxy.verizon.com:9290",1,0) | stats sum(flag) as affected count as total | eval pct=round((affected/total)*100,2)."%" | table pct

panel.title: ⚠️ Percentage of Armis Collectors Proxy Set but NOT vzproxy (%)

search.query: | eval flag=if(proxy_clean!="" AND proxy_clean!="http://vzproxy.verizon.com:9290",1,0) | stats sum(flag) as affected count as total | eval pct=round((affected/total)*100,2)."%" | table pct

panel.title: ⚠️ Total Number of Armis Collectors Count Proxy Set but NOT vzproxy (Count)

search.query: | where proxy_clean!="" AND proxy_clean!="http://vzproxy.verizon.com:9290" | stats count
| where isnull(proxy_clean) OR proxy_clean="" | stats count
| eval flag=if(isnull(proxy_clean) OR proxy_clean="",1,0) | stats sum(flag) as affected count as total | eval pct=round((affected/total)*100,2)."%" | table pct
| eval ntp_display=case( isnull(ntp_clean) OR ntp_clean="","(blank)", true(),ntp_clean ) | stats count by ntp_display | sort -count
| eval dns_display=case( isnull(dns_clean) OR dns_clean="","(blank)", true(),dns_clean ) | stats count by dns_display | sort -count
| eval proxy_display=case( isnull(proxy_clean) OR proxy_clean="","(blank)", true(),proxy_clean ) | stats count by proxy_display | rename proxy_display AS "Proxy Setting" | sort -count

| eval age_seconds=now()-creation_epoch | eval years=floor(age_seconds/31536000) | eval months=floor((age_seconds%31536000)/2592000) | eval weeks=floor((age_seconds%2592000)/604800) | eval days=floor((age_seconds%604800)/86400) | eval hours=floor((age_seconds%86400)/3600) | eval minutes=floor((age_seconds%3600)/60) | eval Age=years." years, ".months." months, ".weeks." weeks, ".days." days, ".hours.":".minutes | table "Collector ID" "Creation Date (GMT -4)" "Last Seen (GMT -4)" Age "Name","System Vendor" ,"Product Serial","MAC Address" "IP Address" "Default Gateway" "Subnet" "NTP Servers" "DNS Servers" "Https Proxy" Status | sort -creation_epoch
